title: Speedy Savory Saudi Arabian Mackerel Stew
description: A nutty and dense Saudi Arabian stew featuring mackerel, this dish is a quick fix for a weeknight dinner and is ovo-vegetarian friendly.

ingredients.name: mackerel fillets
ingredients.notes: canned in water, drained and flaked

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add flaked mackerel, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in beaten eggs and cook until the eggs are set, about 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
